We can replace this Constructor by using @AllArgsConstructor

We can use MapStruct here. May be it can be considered as improvment later.

MapStruct is a code generator that greatly simplifies the implementation of mappings between Java bean types based on a convention over configuration approach.

The generated mapping code uses plain method invocations and thus is fast, type-safe and easy to understand.

Hello Lee Anjell. Properties is a keyword within Swagger see 
https://swagger.io/docs/specification/data-models/data-types/#:~:text=The%20properties%20keyword%20is%20used,a%20schema%20for%20each%20property.&text=Tip%3A%20In%20OpenAPI%2C%20objects%20are,the%20request%20and%20response%20definitions.
